function.name: search_files
function.description: Search for files matching a regex pattern in their contents. Returns matching file paths and line contents.

pattern.description: Regex pattern to search for in file contents

path.description: Directory to search in (relative to project root)

include.description: Glob pattern for files to include (e.g. '*.ts')

maxResults.description: Maximum number of matching lines to return

function.name: read_file
function.description: Read the contents of a file. Supports optional line range for efficient partial reads of large files.

path.description: File path relative to project root

startLine.description: Line number to start reading from (1-indexed, inclusive)

endLine.description: Line number to stop reading at (1-indexed, inclusive)

function.name: write_file
function.description: Write contents to a file, creating parent directories if they don't exist. Overwrites existing file.

path.description: File path relative to project root

function.name: list_directory
function.description: List contents of a directory with file names, types, and sizes.

path.description: Directory path relative to project root

maxDepth.description: Maximum recursion depth (only used when recursive is true)

function.name: execute_command
function.description: Execute a shell command in the project directory. Returns stdout, stderr, and exit code.

function.name: analyze_code
function.description: Analyze source code for patterns and structure using regex-based extraction. Returns structured information about the code.

path.description: File path to analyze (relative to project root)
